message:
feat: Add multimodal vision support and advanced optimizations

Major features added:
- Multimodal vision inference via MTMD integration (src/multimodal.zig)
- Dynamic requantization for memory-constrained systems (src/requantizer.zig)
- Importance matrix (imatrix) support for better quantization (src/imatrix.zig)
- Model hash calculation for profile caching (src/model_hash.zig)
- Vision encoder (mmproj) detection and profiling
- Metal shader pre-compilation to eliminate first-run lag
- Enhanced profile schema with vision support metadata (v3)

This implements Phase 8-10 of the optimization roadmap, adding:
1. Vision encoder support with automatic mmproj detection
2. Intelligent requantization based on available memory
3. Profile versioning and backward compatibility
4. Build-time shader compilation for instant startup

Model types now supported:
- Text-only models (existing)
- Vision-language models (new: LLaVA, InternVL, Qwen2-VL, etc.)

Profile schema updated to v3 with new fields:
- mmproj_path: Path to vision encoder
- supports_vision: Boolean flag for multimodal capability
- requantized_model_path: Cached requantized model location
- requantization_type: Target quantization (Q2_K, IQ2_XS, etc.)

Next steps: Tier 1 features (Wizer-style freeze, package manager)
